MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Hayden Gridley and Devon Sanford on behalf of Plaintiff/ Respondent
Jason Wu, Esq. and Joshua Silber on behalf of Defendant/Appellant JML 3065 Clay Investments LLC

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Mr. Gridley, Plaintiff/ Respondent, testifies on his own behalf.

Mr. Wu testifies on behalf of JML 3065 Clay Investments LLC., Defendant/Appellant
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Real Estate Lease

Mr. Silber makes additional comments.

Nr. Gridley makes additional remarks.

In the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
